---
title: "Results: lung"
format: html
---

## Table 1 and Table 2: Summary results in PLWH and without HIV


```{r, include=FALSE}

#This code prepares the .qmd environent for analysis

organ<-"lung"

Results_HIV_gt    <- readRDS("../cache/Results_HIV_gt.rds")
Results_nonHIV_gt <- readRDS("../cache/Results_nonHIV_gt.rds")

source("../R/setup.R")
source("../R/functions.R")



```



### Table 1: People Living With HIV (PLWH)

This table summarizes the number and proportion of people living with HIV who reside within defined catchment areas of:

- Active transplant centers  
- HIV R+ transplant centers  

Catchment areas are defined by:

- 50-mile radius  
- 60-minute driving time  
- 100-mile radius  
- 200-mile radius  

Results are shown for 2017 and 2022.

---

```{r, echo=FALSE}


tbl_body <- gt::extract_body(Results_HIV_gt[[organ]])

tbl_body_no_hope <- tbl_body %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !dplyr::if_any(
      everything(),
      ~ stringr::str_detect(as.character(.x), stringr::regex("HOPE", ignore_case = TRUE))
    )
  ) %>%
  gt::gt() %>%
  {
    purrr::reduce(
      year_list,
      ~ .x %>%
        gt::tab_spanner(
          label = .y,
          columns = matches(paste0("_", .y, "$"))
        ),
      .init = .
    )
  } %>%
  gt::fmt_number(
    columns = matches("Numerator_|Denominator_"),
    decimals = 0,
    use_seps = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gt::fmt_number(
    columns = matches("Percentage_"),
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_header(
    title = "Access to transplant in PLWH"
  ) %>%
  gt::cols_label_with(~ "Numerator",   columns = matches("^Numerator_")) %>%
  gt::cols_label_with(~ "Denominator", columns = matches("^Denominator_")) %>%
  gt::cols_label_with(~ "Percentage",  columns = matches("^Percentage_")) %>%
  {
    purrr::reduce(
      seq_along(year_list),
      ~ .x %>%
        gt::tab_style(
          style = gt::cell_fill(
            color = colorRampPalette(c("lightgray", "lightblue"))(length(year_list))[.y]
          ),
          locations = gt::cells_body(
            columns = matches(paste0("_", year_list[.y], "$"))
          )
        ),
      .init = .
    )
  } %>%
  {
    purrr::reduce(
      seq_len(length(year_list) - 1),
      ~ .x %>%
        gt::tab_style(
          style = gt::cell_borders(
            sides = "right",
            weight = gt::px(2),
            color = "black"
          ),
          locations = gt::cells_body(
            columns = matches(paste0("Percentage_", year_list[.y], "$"))
          )
        ) %>%
        gt::tab_style(
          style = gt::cell_borders(
            sides = "left",
            weight = gt::px(2),
            color = "black"
          ),
          locations = gt::cells_body(
            columns = matches(paste0("Numerator_", year_list[.y + 1], "$"))
          )
        ),
      .init = .
    )
  }

tbl_body_no_hope
```

### Table 2: Individuals Without HIV

This table presents the same catchment analysis for individuals without HIV.  

It allows direct comparison of geographic access between:

- PLWH  
- Individuals without HIV  

---

```{r, echo=FALSE}


Results_nonHIV_gt[[organ]]

```



## Figures

Figures are grouped into three sections.

---

### Compare PLWH and non-HIV

These figures compare geographic access between PLWH and individuals without HIV within each catchment definition.

Each panel corresponds to a distance-based definition:

- 50 miles  
- 60 minutes  
- 100 miles  
- 200 miles  

These figures highlight disparities in access by HIV status.

---

```{r, echo=FALSE}


list.files(
  glue::glue("../figures/{organ}"),
  pattern = "Combined.*\\.png$",
  full.names = TRUE
)%>%
  str_subset("Active")%>%
  str_subset("HOPE", negate = TRUE) %>%
  {
    .[order(as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(., "\\d+(?=(mile|min))")))]
  } %>%
  knitr::include_graphics()

```

---

### Compare PLWH Between Years

These figures evaluate changes in geographic access among PLWH between 2017 and 2022.

For each catchment definition, results are shown for:

- Active centers  
- HIV R+ centers  


This section highlights temporal changes in transplant center availability.

---


```{r, echo=FALSE}


list.files(
  glue::glue("../figures/{organ}"),
  pattern = "Combined.*\\.png$",
  full.names = TRUE
)%>%
  str_subset("Active", negate=TRUE)%>%
  str_subset("HOPE", negate = TRUE) %>%
  {
    .[order(as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(., "\\d+(?=(mile|min))")))]
  } %>%
  knitr::include_graphics()

```

---

### Beeswarm Plots

In these beeswarm plots, we plot the number of PLWh in each transplant center's catchment area, classifying centers by whether or not they had performed an HIV R+ lung transplant in 2013-2017 and 2018-2022, respectively.

Each point represents a transplant center, with the distribution shown for each distance definition.

These plots illustrate variability in geographic access across centers rather than only aggregate proportions.


The 50-mile results are below.
![](../figures/lung/Beeswarm lung plot 2026-2-14 50mile.png)

The 60-minute results are below.
![](../figures/lung/Beeswarm lung plot 2026-2-14 60min.png)

The 100-mile results are below.
![](../figures/lung/Beeswarm lung plot 2026-2-14 100mile.png)

The 200-mile results are below.
![](../figures/lung/Beeswarm lung plot 2026-2-14 200mile.png)
